backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the StudyNeeds backend, defining data types (Product, Order, StudentLead, TeacherRegistration) and CRUD operations for products, orders, user profiles, tuition leads, and teacher registrations with admin access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (floating WhatsApp button, Call Now button, Visit Centre address) to their corresponding source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing the purpose and key details of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA with meta tags for SEO and theme color, a root div mount point, and a script tag loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, shop, product, cart, checkout, order-confirmation, admin, tuition, documentation) and wraps the app with CartProvider, WishlistProvider, WhatsAppButton, and ProfileSetupModal.
frontend/src/components/admin/Documentat: A modal that shows full details of a documentation request, allows status updates, and provides download links for uploaded documents.
Admin panel component that lists documentation requests in a table with search and status-filter controls, and opens a detail modal on row selection.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderDetai: A placeholder modal dialog for displaying order details that shows a warning message indicating backend support is not yet available.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrdersMana: A placeholder orders management page with search/filter UI and a table that displays a message indicating orders functionality requires backend support.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductFor: A modal form for creating and editing products, supporting image upload, category selection, and fields like price, discount, stock quantity, and rating using create/update product mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductsMa: An admin page for managing products with search/category filtering, a data table, and support for adding, editing, and deleting products via query hooks and modals.
frontend/src/components/admin/StudentLea: A read-only modal dialog that displays detailed information about a student lead including personal info, contact, location, requirements, and additional notes.
frontend/src/components/admin/TeacherReg: A read-only modal dialog that displays comprehensive details of a teacher registration including personal info, professional details, and status with color-coded badges.
An admin page that lists all teacher registrations in a searchable table with status indicators, and opens a detail modal when a registration is selected.
frontend/src/components/admin/TuitionLea: Admin component that displays a searchable, filterable table of student tuition leads with status badges and a detail view modal.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserDetail: Placeholder modal dialog for displaying user details; currently shows a 'not yet available' message pending backend support.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersManag: Placeholder admin page for user management that renders a disabled search and empty table with a notice that backend support is required.
frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx: Route guard component that verifies Internet Identity authentication and admin status before rendering children, showing a loading spinner or access-denied message with redirect otherwise.
frontend/src/components/BannerSlider.tsx: Auto-rotating image carousel displaying five promotional banners with 5-second intervals, manual prev/next navigation arrows, and dot indicators.
frontend/src/components/CategoriesMenu.t: A modal overlay component displaying a grid of 8 product categories with icons and links to their respective shop pages, closable via backdrop click or X button.
frontend/src/components/CategoriesSectio: A homepage section rendering a responsive grid of 8 category cards with icons that link to category-specific shop pages.
frontend/src/components/DocumentationSer: A form component for submitting documentation service requests (e.g., certificates, government forms) with file upload support, validation, and a success state after submission.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A site footer with sections for About, Policies, Contact info, social media links, and a newsletter subscription form.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: The main sticky site header including a top bar, logo, search form, location selector, categories menu, cart icon, and Internet Identity authentication button, with mobile menu support.
frontend/src/components/LocationSelector: A modal dialog that displays a grid of Indian cities for the user to select a delivery location, closing automatically after selection.
frontend/src/components/MobileMenu.tsx: A slide-in mobile navigation drawer with links to Home, Shop, and Admin Panel, plus an authentication button using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a single product card with image, price, discount badge, rating, wishlist toggle, add-to-cart, and buy-now actions, linking to the product detail page.
frontend/src/components/ProductSection.t: Displays a titled grid section of up to 8 ProductCard components for a given list of products.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that collects a new user's name, email, phone, and address and saves the profile via a mutation hook.
Renders a grid of four service cards (e-commerce, tuition, documentation, career counselling) with navigation to their respective routes.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: Displays a carousel of customer testimonials with previous/next navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: A fixed floating button that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat link for customer support.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Renders a section highlighting five platform features (trusted, affordable, local, verified teachers, fast delivery) as icon-and-text tiles.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state (add, remove, update, clear) with localStorage persistence and helpers for total items and price.
frontend/src/context/WishlistContext.tsx: React context managing a wishlist of product IDs with localStorage persistence and add/remove/check helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing it when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the currently authenticated caller's user profile from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and provider that manage Internet Identity authentication via AuthClient, exposing login/logout state and the user's identity.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for all backend interactions including products, admin checks, student leads, teacher registrations, and documentation requests.
frontend/src/hooks/useWishlist.ts: Thin re-export hook that returns the WishlistContext value for convenient use in components.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Poppins font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens using OKLCH color values with a deep navy blue primary color.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page with tabbed management sections for products, orders, users, tuition leads, teacher registrations, and documentation requests, displaying summary count cards at the top.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with quantity controls and removal options, calculates totals with a delivery charge, and shows an empty state when the cart has no items.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page with a delivery address form and payment method selection, currently showing a notice that order placement is not yet available pending backend support.
frontend/src/pages/DocumentationPage.tsx: Marketing page for online documentation and cyber services, featuring a hero section with call-to-action buttons for WhatsApp, phone, and an inline service request form.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page that fetches all products and renders categorized product sections (trending, school essentials, budget deals, furniture) alongside a banner slider, services, and testimonials sections.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Static order confirmation page displaying a success message with a 3-5 business day delivery estimate and a link to continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailsPage.ts: Displays a single product's details including images, price with discount, quantity selector, and add-to-cart/buy-now actions, plus a related products section fetched by category.
frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx: Renders a shop listing page with a category sidebar and sortable product grid, fetching all products or category-filtered products based on the URL parameter.
frontend/src/pages/TuitionPage.tsx: Home tuition page showing demo teacher cards and two forms—one for students seeking tutors and one for teacher registration—with submission handled via React Query mutations.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read, persist, and clear URL query parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, using sessionStorage for persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors via OKLCH variables, fonts, border radius, shadows, animations) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the Documentation & Cyber Services site for Barh, Patna, tracking existing features and pending feature requests such as WhatsApp button, Call Now button, and Visit Centre section.
